title: Replay Fight
description: Replay Fight is a lightweight compatibility bridge between Epic Fight and Replay Mod (ReForgedPlay)
body:
# Replay Fight ⚔️📹 **Fix your Epic Fight animations in Replay Mod!** Replay Fight is a simple patch that allows the **Epic Fight Mod** animations to render correctly within **Replay Mod**. ### Features * **Animation Sync:** Fixes static or broken player models during replay playback. * **Plug & Play:** Just drop it in your mods folder no configuration required. ### Requirements 1. [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) 2. [ReForgedPlay](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reforgedplay-mod) (unofficial fork of Replay Mod) 3. Replay Fight (This mod) ## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
Q: Does it support Epic Fight addons? A: Some addons may be supported, so the best way to know is to try it yourself!
Q: Why are items and entities replaced (mismatched) in the replay? A: That happens because of a change in the Registry ID mapping. If you record in a world and later install or remove mods specifically mods that add new items, blocks, or entities, the game assigns them new internal IDs. Since the replay file remembers the "old" IDs, it may display the wrong objects during replay.

The Solution: To ensure your replays stay accurate, it is best to create a new world only after your modpack is finalized. Avoid adding or removing content-heavy mods mid-playthrough if you plan on reviewing those replays later.
